title: Family Katta
subTitle: A golden jubilee celebration brings an estranged family together, with grandmother Malati hoping to mend long-standing rifts. Old wounds resurface, challenging the family's ability to reconcile.

subTitle: Dada Dandekar hates women and dissuades his three unmarried sons from finding a bride. However, things change when Prachi enters their lives.

title: Patanjali Yog by Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Renowned Indian spiritual leader Swami Ramdev delivers demonstrations of various yoga poses and exercises for a healthy life.

title: Kesari
subTitle: Balram, a wrestler from a poor family, dreams of winning the Maharashtra Kesari title. However, his father objects to this as he wants him to join the family business.

title: Kaksparsh
subTitle: Uma tragically loses her husband at an early age and goes through numerous challenges as a young widow. So, she seeks the help of her brother-in-law despite their complicated relationship.

title: Swarajya Rakshak Sambhaji
subTitle: Sambhaji Maharaj confronts numerous obstacles as heir to the Maratha throne. Soon, he fights valiantly against Mughal invasions while managing internal conflicts and resource constraints.

subTitle: The host invites various celebrities and ordinary people into his kitchen to prepare delectable recipes and provide tips and tricks on kitchen chores and cooking.

title: Aflatoon
subTitle: Raja, a good-for-nothing fortune hunter, sets his sights on the daughter of a wealthy businessman. Before long, love takes over and brings about a twist in the tale.

title: Khulta Kali Khulena
subTitle: Vikrant gets married to Monica, who is pregnant with the child of another man. Amid the differences between the two, Vikrant falls in love with Monica's sister.

subTitle: Orphaned couple Rakesh and Jaya, seeking parental love, unwittingly hire an asylum escapee as a mother figure for their young son.
